title: Better Dropping
description: This is a mod for better and more real item dropping in Minecraft
body:
![item on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/464cdf7bd77c9aba8fc81ad32ca1f607e16842ce.png)
# What does it do?
>    Well,a very simple mod by my simple idea.
    This is a mod for better and more real item dropping in Minecraft.Item dropped on the ground displays in a more real effect.Item dropped by mobs or blocks will be picked up normally.But for item dropped by player,it can't be "attracted" by you directly,if you want to pick it up again,you should press the right key on your mouse to allow for  secondly owning the item,in order to avoid pick up the item you dropped just that you don't wanna. 
![a cake and steak on the dining tabe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/477b958c33a5c5092dec74ae9ef5134c148545fc_0.webp)
## Features
-     Use UUID to provide a random angle
-     Become thicker with more same item
-     Should press right key on mouse if pick up item player dropped
